Bug Title: API returns 500 Internal server error when creating a new booking with invalid headers
Steps to Reproduce:
1.Enter https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/ in URL field
2.Set POST method and add endpoint booking to URL
3.Add invalid Headers "Content-Type and Accept
4.Enter valid valid booking payload in Body
5.Click Send
Expected Result: Response body contains an appropriate error status code (e.g. 400 Bad Request"

Bug Title: API returns 500 Internal server error when creating a new booking without a request body
Steps to Reproduce:
1.Enter https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/ in URL field
2.Set POST method and add endpoint booking to URL
3.Add valid Headers "Content-Type and Accept
4.Leave the request body empty
5.Click Send
Expected Result: Response body contains an appropriate error status code (e.g. 400 Bad Request"

Bug Title: a new booking is created successfully when missing the mandatory fields
Steps to Reproduce:
1.Enter https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/ in URL field
2.Set POST method and add endpoint booking to URL
3.Add valid Headers "Content-Type and Accept
4.Leave the request body empty
5.Click Send
Expected Result: Response body contains an appropriate error status code (e.g. 400 Bad Request"
Actual Result: a new booking is created successfully with status code 200 OK

Steps to Reproduce:
1.Enter https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/ in URL field
2.Set POST method and add endpoint booking to URL
3.Add valid Headers "Content-Type and Accept

Bug Title: Incorrect status code on successful deletion
Steps to Reproduce:
1.Enter https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/ in URL field
2. Set request method to DELETE and add booking/{id} to URL
3. Add valid Cookie: token={{Tokenautomated}} header
4. Click Send
Expected Result: Booking deleted successfully and status code 200 OK
Actual Result: Booking deleted successfully and status code 201 create
